emergency.title: Emergency Help
emergency.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions. We'll tell you exactly what to do.
emergency.q1: Did your landlord give you written notice before this happened?
emergency.q2: Did they change the locks or block your entry?
emergency.q3: Were your belongings removed from the unit?
emergency.q4: Are you currently outside and unable to enter?
emergency.q5: Are you worried about your immigration status?
emergency.voiceSubtitle: Tell us in your own words — we'll understand.

rights.title: Know Your Rights
rights.missionText: HavenAI protects immigrant renters in New York City. We ensure that every renter, regardless of immigration status, language, or income, can understand what they are signing, assert their rights the moment they are violated, and access trustworthy legal help instantly.
rights.rightsTitle: Your Key Rights as a Renter in NYC
rights.right1: Your landlord cannot lock you out without a court order — period.
rights.right2: Security deposits must be returned within 14 days of your lease ending.
rights.right3: Landlords cannot charge more than one month's rent as a security deposit (in most cases).
rights.right4: Broker fees paid to your landlord are illegal in NYC.
rights.right5: You have the right to take your landlord to Housing Court regardless of your immigration status.
rights.right6: Your landlord cannot threaten to report you to immigration authorities.
rights.right7: You have the right to a safe, habitable apartment — landlords must make repairs.
rights.right8: Your scholarship, fellowship, or foreign income is a lawful source of income in NYC. A landlord cannot reject your application solely because your money comes from abroad or from a university.
rights.right9: Landlords must accept institutional guarantors (such as Insurent or TheGuarantors) as an alternative to a US co-signer. They cannot require a US-based guarantor and refuse all other options.

lawyer.title: Get Legal Help
lawyer.subtitle: Request a free consultation from a vetted housing attorney.
lawyer.submittedText: A housing attorney will contact you within 24 hours.
lawyer.disclaimer: Submitting this form does not create an attorney-client relationship. HavenAI does not represent you.
